description: Developed backend services for warehouse inbound processing, warehouse outbound processing and inventory movement, including data validation, normalization, and persistence of automotive parts data.
Wrote and optimized complex SQL queries involving lock handling, transaction, multiple joins, subqueries, aggregations, and conditional logic to support warehouse workflows.
Improved SQL performance by approximately 20–30% through query refactoring and index optimization.
Built data export modules (Excel/CSV/TSV) with multilingual headers, timezone handling, and dynamic column mapping.
Participated in the Spring Boot 2.x to 4.x upgrade, assisting with investigating dependency updates and compatibility fixes.
Built backend services for a real-time chat platform using Go, gRPC, and WebSocket.
Implemented WebSocket-based messaging for low-latency, real-time communication.
Developed message processing logic (creation, validation, broadcasting, ordering).
Implemented Webhook mechanisms to allow external embedded applications to receive real-time events (e.g. message creation, updates).
